text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, March 11. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Got it, Mike. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Updating our financial spreadsheets. First United Mortgage offered 5.5% with zero points. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. A rate of 5.5% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing our household budget today. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
